title: Build main shell and workspace switch
description: Refactor setup_ui into a main-window shell with top-level switch buttons and a content host for two persistent workspaces. Default workspace is blind box / animal extraction. Add style initialization and a show/switch helper, but do not migrate all existing controls yet beyond what is necessary to preserve startup.
test: Smoke check: instantiate BlindBoxExtractor with tk root where environment allows; static check that setup_ui creates two workspace frames and switch commands. Compile check after change.
acceptance_criteria: Main window has two top-level switch buttons; default visible workspace is blind box / animal extraction; clicking switch helper can show expression workspace in same root; no extraction logic changed.
hints: Preserve business logic and widget attribute names. Use persistent frames. || .workflow/active/WFS-game-content-ui-redesign/IMPL_PLAN.md;Game content extraction/内容抽取.py;Game content extraction/CLAUDE.md
execution_directives: Use apply_patch for edits. Do not run GUI unless necessary. Do not add third-party dependencies. Run python -m py_compile 'Game content extraction\内容抽取.py' if feasible.
findings: Refactored setup_ui into main shell with _configure_styles, top-level workspace switch buttons, persistent workspace frames, _show_workspace(name), and default blind_box workspace. Existing blind box controls were parented into a builder; expression area is still placeholder.
acceptance_met: Two top-level switch buttons exist; default workspace is blind_box; switch helper shows same-root frames; py_compile passed per worker; GUI smoke blocked by local Tcl init.tcl issue.
